commands.summary: Backend build passed with the MCP-safe governance capabilities discovery endpoint.
HTTP test asserts GET /api/governance/capabilities is reachable over an MCP token and advertises forgelink/hitl_surface/contract and the submit/await/outcome endpoints.
Local audit passed; AGH-028 recorded as deferred (Fabric-side routing lives in forgewire-fabric).

environment.process_note: AGH-028 ForgeLink side: governance capability discovery + the submit/await/outcome contract ship here so Fabric can auto-detect ForgeLink. The Fabric-side auto-detection/pane routing is deferred to the forgewire-fabric repo (decision 0004 spans two repos).
